attendance.whatBody: Check in when you start work and check out when you finish. Your attendance history appears here automatically.
attendance.howStep1: Tap Check In when you arrive at work (office or home).
attendance.howStep2: Tap Check Out when your shift ends.
attendance.howStep3: Review daily hours and totals in this list.
attendance.startBody: Use the check-in button at the top of the home screen.

expenses.whatBody: Capture receipts and submit expenses for reimbursement. Approved claims are tracked here.
expenses.howStep1: Tap + and photograph or upload your receipt.
expenses.howStep2: Choose a category and enter the amount.
expenses.howStep3: Submit for approval — status updates appear in this list.
expenses.startBody: Keep a photo of your receipt handy.

checklist.whatBody: Keep work, home, and personal tasks in one checklist with due dates and progress.
checklist.howStep1: Tap + to create a task with a name and due date.
checklist.howStep2: Mark tasks done as you complete them.
checklist.howStep3: Track overall progress on the overview bar.
checklist.startBody: Start with one small task due today.

invoices.whatBody: Build professional invoices, preview them, and track payment status.
invoices.howStep1: Tap + and enter client details and line items.
invoices.howStep3: Send to your client and monitor open vs paid here.
invoices.startBody: You can save a draft and finish later.

customers.whatBody: Browse ERP customers synced from your company workspace.
customers.howStep1: Use Open in CRM for Frappe CRM on your tenant host.
customers.howStep2: Use Work Desk for full ERP customer records and accounting links.

leaves.whatBody: Apply for annual, sick, and other leave types. Your balance and history stay in one place.
leaves.howStep1: Choose a leave type and tap start or end date to pick your period.
leaves.howStep2: Open Calendar to review your schedule, or use the date picker on the leave form.
leaves.howStep3: Submit your request — approved leave appears in history.
leaves.startBody: Tap start or end date on the leave form to pick dates and choose a leave type.

notices.whatBody: HR announcements from your organization appear here.
notices.howStep1: Read published announcements on this page.
notices.howStep2: If you have write access, use + to publish or edit announcements.
